mapper.select: SELECT * FROM batch_tasks WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM batch_tasks WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO batch_tasks ( task_id, task_type, user_id, user_name, ad_task_id, total_count, success_count, failed_count, status, progress, error_message, config_json, result_json, started_at, completed_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{taskType}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{adTaskId}, #{totalCount}, #{successCount}, #{failedCount}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{errorMessage}, #{configJson}, #{resultJson}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE batch_tasks SET status = #{status} WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE batch_tasks SET status = 'processing', started_at = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE batch_tasks SET success_count = success_count + 1 WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE batch_tasks SET failed_count = failed_count + 1 WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE batch_tasks SET progress = CASE WHEN total_count > 0 THEN LEAST(ROUND((success_count + failed_count) * 100.0 / total_count), 100) ELSE 0 END WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE batch_tasks SET error_message = #{errorMessage} WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM batch_tasks WHERE status = 'processing' AND started_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE) ORDER BY started_at ASC
